ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-scoped secret ID used by Personal Assistant.
ast.target: 个人助手使用的保险库范围密钥 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stored in your OS keychain. Leave empty and save to remove it.
ast.target: 存储在您的 OS 密钥链中。留空并保存即可移除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show tags in local graph view
ast.target: 在局部图谱视图中显示标签

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show attachments in local graph view
ast.target: 在局部图谱视图中显示附件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show neighbors in local graph view
ast.target: 在局部图谱视图中显示邻居

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 折叠局部图谱视图设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically set colors of local graph view.
ast.target: 自动设置局部图谱视图的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use personal assistant set colors of graph view.
ast.target: 使用个人助手设置图谱视图的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will be the Color used in the graph view.
ast.target: 这将是图谱视图中使用的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Value only supports formatted timestamp and regular string.
ast.target: 值仅支持格式化的时间戳和常规字符串。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude files in the directory to update metadata
ast.target: 排除目录中要更新元数据的文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the default statistics dashboard view
ast.target: 选择默认的统计仪表板视图

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display word counts under each heading while editing.
ast.target: 编辑时在每个标题下显示字数统计。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include text inside HTML and Obsidian comments in word and character counts.
ast.target: 在字数和字符数统计中包含 HTML 和 Obsidian 注释内的文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the AI service provider. Presets fill recommended defaults; you can edit the URL and models after switching.
ast.target: 选择 AI 服务提供商。预设会填充推荐的默认值；切换后您可以编辑 URL 和模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stored securely in your OS keychain (macOS Keychain / iOS Keychain / Windows Credential Manager). Clear the field to remove it.
ast.target: 安全存储在您的 OS 密钥链中（macOS 钥匙串 / iOS 钥匙串 / Windows 凭据管理器）。清除该字段即可移除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API base URL for the selected provider
ast.target: 所选提供商的 API 基础 URL

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the AI model to use
ast.target: 要使用的 AI 模型名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional router model for Memory/WebSearch decisions. Sends your request and explicit context to your AI provider; hidden vault content is not sent. Blank uses local fallback rules.
ast.target: 用于内存/网络搜索决策的可选路由器模型。将您的请求和明确上下文发送给您的 AI 提供商；不会发送隐藏的保险库内容。留空则使用本地回退规则。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the model thinking text returned by DashScope in this chat session. It is not added to the final answer, notes, or Memory.
ast.target: 在此聊天会话中显示 DashScope 返回的模型思考文本。它不会添加到最终答案、笔记或内存中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow PA Agent to call the read-only builtin WebSearch tool. Search queries may be sent to DashScope WebSearch MCP and can produce web sources.
ast.target: 允许 PA 代理调用只读的内置网络搜索工具。搜索查询可能会发送到 DashScope 网络搜索 MCP，并可能产生网络来源。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Print plugin diagnostics to the developer console.
ast.target: 将插件诊断信息打印到开发者控制台。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Share local PA Agent usage events for capability invoked, failed, skipped, or unavailable states. Events do not include prompts, note text, observations, or vault paths.
ast.target: 分享本地 PA 代理使用事件，包括能力调用、失败、跳过或不可用状态。事件不包含提示、笔记文本、观察结果或保险库路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skill guides add bounded reference context to chat answers. They do not add tools, write notes, run commands, or change Memory.
ast.target: 技能指南为聊天答案添加有界的参考上下文。它们不会添加工具、写入笔记、运行命令或更改内存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The assistant asks before preparing Memory. After you approve and Memory is ready, changed notes may update in the background while the app is open.
ast.target: 助手会在准备内存前询问您。在您批准且内存准备好后，更改的笔记可能会在应用打开时在后台更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The assistant will ask for your approval before preparing or updating Memory, which uses API calls.
ast.target: 助手会在准备或更新内存前征求您的批准，这会使用 API 调用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show maintenance and diagnostic controls for the local memory copy.
ast.target: 显示本地内存副本的维护和诊断控件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After memory has been prepared, update changed notes automatically while the app is open. Changed note text may be sent to your configured AI provider.
ast.target: 内存准备好后，在应用打开时自动更新更改的笔记。更改的笔记文本可能会发送给您配置的 AI 提供商。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Advanced: model used to prepare memory from notes.
ast.target: 高级：用于从笔记准备内存的模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 更新已更改笔记的内存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prepare memory again for this device. Your notes will not be changed or deleted.
ast.target: 为此设备重新准备内存。您的笔记不会被更改或删除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove this device's local memory copy. Your notes will not be deleted.
ast.target: 移除此设备的本地内存副本。您的笔记不会被删除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delete old Memory cache files after Memory is ready. Your notes will not be deleted.
ast.target: 内存准备好后删除旧的内存缓存文件。您的笔记不会被删除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 用于故障排除的诊断详情。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude note folders from memory. Separate paths with commas.
ast.target: 从内存中排除笔记文件夹。用逗号分隔路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: AI feautured image helper will download the images and save them to this path.
ast.target: AI 精选图片助手将下载图片并保存到此路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The number of images to generate when using AI Featured Image Helper.
ast.target: 使用 AI 精选图片助手时生成的图片数量。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在 frontmatter 中添加键:值

ast.target: 显示通义千问模型思考过程

ast.source: path strings with comma as separator, e.g. `tmp/,notes/templates`

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Type plugin name to find it

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Provider reasoning was received but is hidden. It is not a source or a Memory reference.
ast.target: 提供商推理已接收但已隐藏。它不是来源或记忆引用。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 通义千问模型正在思考...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Tried to use the 'fill' option without the 'Filler' plugin enabled. Please import and register the 'Filler' plugin and make sure it is not disabled in the options
ast.target: 尝试在未启用“填充器”插件的情况下使用“填充”选项。请导入并注册“填充器”插件，并确保它在选项中未被禁用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unexpected error in cache refresh loop:
ast.target: 缓存刷新循环中出现意外错误：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Both LANGSMITH_TRACING_MODE and the legacy OTEL_ENABLED / LANGSMITH_OTEL_ENABLED env vars are set. LANGSMITH_TRACING_MODE takes precedence.
ast.target: 同时设置了 LANGSMITH_TRACING_MODE 和旧版 OTEL_ENABLED / LANGSMITH_OTEL_ENABLED 环境变量。LANGSMITH_TRACING_MODE 优先。

ast.name: warn
warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: When tracing in manual flush mode, you must call `await client.flush()` manually to submit trace batches.
ast.target: [警告]：在手动刷新模式下进行跟踪时，您必须手动调用 `await client.flush()` 来提交跟踪批次。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid LANGSMITH_RUNS_ENDPOINTS – must be valid JSON array of objects with api_url and api_key properties, or object mapping url->apiKey
ast.target: 无效的 LANGSMITH_RUNS_ENDPOINTS – 必须是包含 api_url 和 api_key 属性的有效 JSON 对象数组，或 url->apiKey 的对象映射。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support records in schemas! Try an array of key-value pairs instead.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持模式中的记录！请尝试使用键值对数组。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support schemas with unions as roots! Try wrapping it in an object property.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持以联合类型为根的模式！请尝试将其包装在对象属性中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Provided runId will be used only for the first element of the batch.
ast.target: 提供的 runId 将仅用于批次的第一个元素。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: OpenAI may require a filename for file uploads. Specify a filename in the content block metadata, e.g.: { type: 'file', mimeType: '...', data: '...', metadata: { filename: 'my-file.pdf' } }. Using placeholder filename 'LC_AUTOGENERATED'.
ast.target: OpenAI 可能要求文件上传时指定文件名。请在内容块元数据中指定文件名，例如：{ type: 'file', mimeType: '...', data: '...', metadata: { filename: 'my-file.pdf' } }。使用占位符文件名 'LC_AUTOGENERATED'。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to calculate number of tokens, falling back to approximate count
ast.target: 计算令牌数失败，回退到近似计数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please open a markdown file first
ast.target: 请先打开一个 Markdown 文件

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已将响应添加到编辑器

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Wait for the current response to finish before switching conversations.
ast.target: 请等待当前响应完成后再切换对话。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Wait for the current response to finish before starting a new chat.
ast.target: 请等待当前响应完成后再开始新聊天。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法打开聊天历史记录。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 获取图片失败：任务未成功或超时。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Memory is not ready. Prepare memory first.
ast.target: 记忆未就绪。请先准备记忆。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This device may need to prepare memory again later.
ast.target: 此设备可能稍后需要再次准备记忆。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Old memory cache cleanup is available only after diagnostic status is ready.
ast.target: 旧记忆缓存清理仅在诊断状态就绪后可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Old memory cache was not cleaned because diagnostic status is not safely ready.
ast.target: 旧记忆缓存未被清理，因为诊断状态未安全就绪。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Old memory cache was not cleaned because diagnostic state is not safely ready.
ast.target: 旧记忆缓存未被清理，因为诊断状态未安全就绪。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No old memory cache files found.
ast.target: 未找到旧的记忆缓存文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Old memory cache was not cleaned because diagnostic state changed.
ast.target: 旧记忆缓存未被清理，因为诊断状态已更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Memory needs to be prepared again on this device.
ast.target: 此设备上的记忆需要再次准备。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有要应用的插件更改

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not determine which secret to edit.
ast.target: 无法确定要编辑哪个密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not change Statistics sync setting. Your notes are not affected.
ast.target: 无法更改统计同步设置。您的笔记不受影响。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: got some network issue when accessing github.com
ast.target: 访问 github.com 时遇到网络问题

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Theme files updated. Switch themes or restart Obsidian to apply.
ast.target: 主题文件已更新。请切换主题或重启 Obsidian 以应用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Tips: please switch to edit mode to insert
ast.target: 提示：请切换到编辑模式以插入

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Callout Manager unavailable; showing default callouts only.
ast.target: Callout Manager 不可用；仅显示默认 Callout。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No editable markdown file; callout copied to clipboard
ast.target: 没有可编辑的 Markdown 文件；Callout 已复制到剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No editable markdown file and clipboard is unavailable
ast.target: 没有可编辑的 Markdown 文件且剪贴板不可用

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to copy callout to clipboard
ast.target: 无法将 Callout 复制到剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Memory is unavailable. I will answer normally for now.
ast.target: 记忆不可用。我将暂时正常回答。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Memory was updated, but some notes were skipped.
ast.target: 记忆已更新，但部分笔记被跳过。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Memory is ready. Your notes were not changed.
ast.target: 记忆已就绪。您的笔记未被更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Memory is unavailable. You can still ask normally.
ast.target: 记忆功能暂不可用。您仍可正常提问。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在启动 Obsidian 助手

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: update metadata command is not enabled in setting tab
ast.target: 设置选项卡中未启用更新元数据命令

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Qwen's newer memory model is recommended for new memory copies. Your existing memory model setting was preserved.
ast.target: 推荐使用 Qwen 的较新记忆模型来创建新记忆副本。您现有的记忆模型设置已保留。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 当记忆准备就绪后，您的问题可能会发送给您配置的 AI 提供商以搜索记忆。这不会发送所有笔记文本。

ast.name: body
ast.source: After Memory is prepared, changed note text may be sent to your configured AI provider while updates continue in the background. You can turn this off in Advanced memory controls.
ast.target: 记忆准备就绪后，在后台持续更新期间，更改的笔记文本可能会发送给您配置的 AI 提供商。您可以在高级记忆控制中关闭此功能。

ast.name: body

ast.name: message
ast.source: This deletes the full user and assistant turn from this chat.
ast.target: 这将删除此聊天中的完整用户和助手轮次。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This deletes this unfinished turn from the chat.
ast.target: 这将从聊天中删除此未完成的轮次。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This clears the current chat and draft. Other saved conversations remain in History.
ast.target: 这将清除当前聊天和草稿。其他已保存的对话将保留在历史记录中。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This deletes the conversation and all its turns. This cannot be undone.
ast.target: 这将删除对话及其所有轮次。此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This will remove the API token stored in your OS keychain for Personal Assistant. Existing notes and settings are not changed.
ast.target: 这将移除存储在您操作系统钥匙串中用于个人助理的 API 令牌。现有笔记和设置不会更改。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Your notes will not be changed or deleted. Changed note text may be sent to your configured AI provider to prepare Memory. AI credits or API calls may be used; unchanged notes are skipped when possible.
ast.target: 您的笔记不会被更改或删除。更改的笔记文本可能会发送给您配置的 AI 提供商以准备记忆。可能会使用 AI 积分或 API 调用；尽可能跳过未更改的笔记。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Your notes will not be changed or deleted. This device may need to prepare Memory again before using it.
